source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is launching an office in Bogotá to expand our reach and provide unparalleled services to our clients. We are seeking a skilled Software Engineer Consultant to join our dynamic team and drive the success of our cloud-based solutions.

As the Software Engineer Consultant, you will play a pivotal role in supporting the development, deployment, and maintenance of cloud-based applications within our Solutions Center in Bogotá. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including our US-based colleagues and directly interact with our clients.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/culture/#findamentals– the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

 - Grow your career with the support of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined career path. You will be reviewed every 6 months and eligible for promotion every 12 months.

 - Try new things to develop yourself as a leader. Learn to estimate, gather requirements, develop, test, manage projects, architect and deliver. We do it all!

 - Explore different technologies and develop in cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Build modern applications, data driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, AI, DevOps, and more with languages including: Python, .NET, Java, JavaScript, and SQL, Web technologies like React, Redux, Angular, Vue, and Mobile technologies including iOS and Android

 - Sharpen your professional communication skills. Create and present findings, solutions, and demos to audiences including senior executives and stakeholders

 - Work within a hybrid model

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, community service, social gatherings, and personal and professional development

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people



We Look For:

The successful candidate possesses the following critical qualifications:

 - Passionate technologists with 1+ year of full-time software development experience

 - Lifelong learners for a passion for technology

 - Skilled problem solvers with the desire and proven ability to create innovative solutions

 - Flexible and adaptable attitude- Client, teams and technologies will change with each new challenge

 - Future technology leaders- Dynamic individuals energized by fast paced personal and professional growth

 - Professional communicators who can explain and present concepts to technical and non-technical audiences alike

 - Bachelor’s Degree in MIS, Computer Science, Math, Engineering or comparable experience

 - Fluency in English is required for effective communication with US-based colleagues and customers

 - Legally authorized to work in Colombia



Pariveda Benefits

 - Medical, dental and limited vision – Colmedica

 - Life Insurance

 - EAP

 - Online Caring Community – CareFlash

 - Financial Education Program – Trust Momentum

 - E-learning catalog in Udemy

 - Cell Phone Device

 - Cell Phone Stipend

 - One-time $300,000 COP stipend to purchase a mouse, keyboard, monitor, laptop

 - On Call Allowance

 - Entitled to 15 working days each calendar year

 - Entitled to up to 180 days (6 months) of absence for non-work-related sickness

 - Maternity Leave

 - Paternity Leave

 - Mourning Leave

 - Colombian Public Holiday

Pariveda Solutions aspires that our employee diversity is representative of the marke

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is launching an office in Bogotá to expand our reach and provide unparalleled services to our clients. We are seeking a skilled Lead Software Engineer to join our dynamic team and drive the success of our cloud-based solutions.

As the Lead Software Engineer, you will play a pivotal role in designing, developing and delivering enterprise-level applications within our Solutions Center in Bogotá. You will have an opportunity to expand your knowledge of full software development life cycle, gain direct client exposure, and grow junior team members. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including our US-based colleagues and directly interact with our clients.



You Can Expect To:

 - Grow your career with the support and guidance of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined, individualized career path. You will be reviewed every 6 months and eligible for promotion every 12 months.

 - Lead small Pariveda teams and help teammates develop their skills and careers

 - Diagnose and solve complex problems for Fortune-500 clients in a variety of industries

 - Execute projects from start to finish and get exposure to all roles throughout the SDLC (manage projects, estimate, gather requirements, architect, develop, test, and deliver)

 - Explore different technologies and develop in cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Build modern applications, data driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, AI, DevOps, and more with languages including: Python, .NET, Java, JavaScript, and SQL, Web technologies like React, Redux, Angular, Vue, and Mobile technologies including iOS and Android.

 - Present findings, solutions, and demos to audiences including senior executives and stakeholders

 - Work within a hybrid model

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, personal and professional development, and lead community service and social gathering events

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people



We Look For:

The successful candidate possesses the following critical qualifications:

 - 6+ years of hands-on software development experience

 - Experience with technical leadership such as coaching others and/or leading pieces of projects (estimating/assigning tasks, putting together timelines, requirements gathering, design, etc.)

 - Client facing or consulting experience highly preferred

 - Skilled problem solvers with the desire and proven ability to create and implement innovative solutions

 - Adaptable attitude, able to balance multiple responsibilities, and adjust to varied environments

 - Ability to explain and present concepts to technical and non-technical audiences

 - Bachelor’s Degree in MIS, Computer Science, Math, Engineering, or comparable experience

 - Fluency in English is required for effective communication with US-based colleagues and customers

 - Legally authorized to work in Colombia



Pariveda Benefits

 - Medical, dental and limited vision – Colmedica

 - Life Insurance

 - EAP –

 - Online Caring Community

 - Financial Education Program

 - E-learning catalog

 - Cell Phone Device

 - Cell Phone Stipend

 - One-time $300,000 COP stipend to purchase a mouse, keyboard, monitor, laptop

Pariveda Solutions aspires that our employee diversity is representative of the markets in which we serve. Employment decisions are based solely on merit and business needs and not on race, color, religion,

source_jobs.title: Technology Consulting Manager, Data & Cloud
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is growing in Houston and looking to add an experienced Manager to their team of leaders. We are not your average professional services firm. Change is the new normal; we face an increasingly fast-paced, ambiguous, and complex world. Our vision is to be a different kind of firm that can be the model for all organizations which seek to position themselves to react more quickly and ready to change. To realize this imperative for ourselves and our clients requires people with a unique blend of skills, competencies, character, and motivations.

Are you ready to work in an environment where you are seen and understood as a whole person? Do you want to stop wondering whether you’re paid and treated equitably? Are you a critical thinker and problem “diagnoser”? Do you have the ability to connect the dots that others don’t see, pulling on threads to get to the true root of the problem? If this is you, join us on our aspirational journey to change the world.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/culture/#findamentals– the behaviors that show who we are.





YOU CAN EXPECT TO:

 - Drive your career and become a technology executive through clearly defined expectations, mentorship from Principals and Vice Presidents, and frequent opportunities for advancement

 - Oversee small teams of Pariveda employees and manage relationships with multiple clients in a variety of industries

 - Diagnose complex technical and business problems and implement creative solutions that leverage Pariveda’s capabilities to meet our clients’ needs

 - Use your knowledge of design principles and frameworks to perform and manage all aspects of projects throughout the SDLC including estimation, sprint planning, requirements gathering, architecting, developing, testing, issue/risk management, change control and delivery

 - Lead the development and delivery of IT solutions across a variety of technologies including: Custom web/mobile development, Cloud Solutions in Azure and AWS, IT Strategy, change & program management, Data Driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, CI/CD in DevOps, and more

 - Utilize AI strategically to enhance client solutions, incorporating AI tools to streamline development, uncover insights, and accelerate delivery while upholding and articulating responsible, ethical AI practices in collaboration with clients and stakeholders.

 - Deliver presentations and facilitate meetings while adapting communication to varying audiences including high level stakeholders

 - Identify needs and strengths for career progression of team members and create opportunities for development

 - Mentor junior colleagues by providing career development goals, meeting regularly, writing and deliver semi-annual reviews, and advocating for their career advancement

 - Support company growth by building and maintaining a strong professional network as well as contributing to the recruitment of new employees

 - Actively represent our culture by leading and participating in efforts around continuous learning, personal and professional development, community service and team building

 - Work within a hybrid model, sometimes at home and sometimes in the office

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, personal and professional development, and lead community service and social gathering

source_jobs.title: Lead Software Engineer, Data & Cloud
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

If you are looking for a place where you’ll be challenged to learn, grow, and truly make an impact, we invite you to explore opportunities with our team in Houston. We are looking for lead software developers to design, develop, and deliver enterprise-level applications. You will have an opportunity to expand your knowledge of full software development life cycle, gain direct client exposure, and grow junior team members.



Pariveda is not your average professional services firm. Our focus on people is the key to our success and our mission is to grow you towards your highest potential. We don’t measure one’s worth by the hours they log but rather by their individual growth. We live and celebrate our values by supporting and caring for the whole person, operating transparently, and being curious and unafraid to ask questions. To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://www.parivedasolutions.com/findamentals – the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

As a lead software engineer, you will build custom solutions using a variety of technologies. You will work in small, collaborative teams, while partnering with clients to solve real business challenges in an agile, people-first way.

 - Grow your career with the support and guidance of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined, individualized career path. You will be eligible for promotion every 12 months

 - Lead small Pariveda teams and help teammates develop their skills and careers

 - Diagnose and solve complex problems for Fortune-500 clients in a variety of industries

 - Execute projects from start to finish and get exposure to all roles throughout the SDLC (manage projects, estimate, gather requirements, architect, develop, test, and deliver)

 - Explore different technologies and develop in cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Build modern applications, data driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, AI, DevOps, and more with languages including: Python, .NET, Java, JavaScript, and SQL, Web technologies like React, Redux, Angular, Vue, and Mobile technologies including iOS and Android.

 - Utilize AI strategically to enhance client solutions, incorporating AI tools to streamline development, uncover insights, and accelerate delivery while clearly communicating the value, limitations, and ethical use of AI to clients and stakeholders.

 - Present findings, solutions, and demos to audiences including senior executives and stakeholders

 - Work within a hybrid model

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, personal and professional development, and lead community service and social gathering events

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people



We Look For:

 - 3+ years of hands-on software development experience

 - Experience with technical leadership such as coaching others and/or leading pieces of projects (estimating/assigning tasks, putting together timelines, requirements gathering, design, etc.)

 - Client facing or consulting experience highly preferred

 - Skilled problem solvers with the desire and proven ability to create and implement innovative solutions

 - Adaptable attitude, able to balance multiple responsibilities, and adjust to varied environments

 - Ability to explain and present concepts to technical and non-technical audiences

 - Bachelor’s Degree in MIS, Computer Science,

source_jobs.title: Technology Strategy Leader (Consulting)
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is not your average professional services firm. We're growing our Enterprise Technology Team and looking to add a Technology Strategy Leader (Principal cohort) to our dynamic and creative team. Pariveda's people-centric model and mission to grow you towards your highest potential will pave the way to grow you from Principal to Vice President. This role will be based in Dallas with Hybrid expectations.

Are you tired of feeling like a cog in a machine? Are you ready to make an impact and create change? Are you curious and energized by challenging problems? If you're answering yes to these questions, let's talk. Join our team and be a part of something great.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals – https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/culture/#findamentals the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

As a member of our Technology Group, we’re looking for a principal-level technology leader who can advise senior clients, shape complex transformation work, and connect strategy to execution. The ideal candidate brings broad technical credibility, strong executive communication, and experience translating ambiguous business challenges into pragmatic technology solutions. This person is comfortable operating across discovery, solution shaping, and delivery, and can bridge client goals, architecture choices, and business outcomes.

 - Advance your career to become a Pariveda Vice President through clearly defined expectations, mentorship from executives, and regular opportunities for advancement

 - Lead Enterprise Solution Design and Implementation – intersection of business and technology, with focus in: Cloud across platforms (AWS, Azure, Google), Mobility, Data Analytics & Insights (Machine Learning), and User-Centered Design

 - As a leader in our Technology group, you will support clients and projects across the firm, leaning heavily into work centered on modern data platforms and AI

 - Utilize AI strategically to enhance client solutions, incorporating AI tools to streamline development, uncover insights, and accelerate delivery while upholding and articulating responsible, ethical AI practices in collaboration with clients and stakeholder

 - Manage project teams and oversee all aspects of the SDLC including estimation, sprint planning, requirements gathering, architecting, developing, testing, issue/risk management, change control and delivery

 - Diagnose complex technical and business problems and implement creative solutions that leverage Pariveda’s capabilities to meet our clients’ needs

 - Actively manage project profitability for both our firm and our clients by taking a leadership role in executing the sales process while understanding client and/or partner legal agreements affecting their teams' work

 - Support company growth by building and maintaining a strong professional network as well as contributing to the recruitment of new employees

 - Mentor junior colleagues by providing career development goals, meeting regularly, writing and deliver semi-annual reviews, and advocating for their career advancement

 - Work within a hybrid model, sometimes at home and sometimes in the office

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, personal and professional development, and lead community service and social gathering events

 - Work with smart, humble, and sup

source_jobs.title: Technical Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is not your average professional services firm. Looking to join a team in Toronto where you will be challenged and encouraged to grow your career in a supportive, purpose-driven environment?

Explore a career with Pariveda, an employee-owned professional services firm that provides strategy and technology services—from idea to impact. We have been named by Glassdoor as a Best Place to Work seven times since 2017 and are currently looking for motivated individuals who are passionate about using technology to solve problems and help others succeed.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://www.parivedasolutions.com/findamentals – the behaviors that show who we are.




YOU CAN EXPECT TO:

As a Pariveda Consultant, you will work in small teams, collaborating with other Pariveda employees while partnering with clients to solve real business challenges in an agile, people-first way.

 - Grow your career with the support of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined career path. You will be reviewed every 6 months and eligible for promotion every 12 months.

 - Try new things to develop yourself as a leader. Learn to estimate, gather requirements, develop, test, manage projects, architect and deliver. We do it all!

 - Explore different technologies and develop applications in languages including: Java, .NET, Python, JavaScript, and SQL, Web technologies like React, Redux, Angular, Vue, Mobile technologies including iOS and Android, Cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and Data Driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, DevOps, and more.

 - Utilize AI strategically to enhance client solutions, incorporating AI tools to streamline development, uncover insights, and accelerate delivery while clearly communicating the value, limitations, and ethical use of AI to clients and stakeholders.

 - Sharpen your professional communication skills. Create and present findings, solutions, and demos to audiences including senior executives and stakeholders.

 - Work within a hybrid model

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, community service, social gatherings, and personal and professional development.

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people.




WE LOOK FOR:

 - Passionate technologists with software development or relevant internship experience

 - Lifelong learners for a passion for technology

 - Skilled problem solvers with the desire and proven ability to create innovative solutions

 - Flexible and adaptable attitude- Client, teams and technologies will change with each new challenge

 - Future technology leaders- Dynamic individuals energized by fast paced personal and professional growth

 - Professional communicators who can explain and present concepts to technical and non-technical audiences alike

 - Bachelor’s Degree in MIS, Computer Science, Math, Engineering or comparable experience

 - Legally authorized to work for any company in Canada without sponsorship




PARIVEDA BENEFITS

 - Transparent and Equitable Salary. The salary range for this position is $100,000 - $110,000 annually. Actual salaries may vary based on factors including but not limited to location, experience, and performance.

 - RRSP 4% match

 - Plenty of paid time off – 4 weeks of vacation time, 10 sick days,10 holidays, 1 floating holiday

 - Paid sabbatical after 5 years of service for

source_jobs.title: Vice President, Consulting
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is seeking a Vice President for our Washington DC office. In this role, you will establish and deepen client relationships, drive new business development, expand strategic accounts, lead teams in service delivery, and contribute to the achievement of Pariveda’s mission and objectives. Pariveda's people-centric model and mission to grow our people towards their highest potential will provide you with opportunities to continue developing yourself, as well as mentor and guide those around you.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/culture/ – the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

As a member of the DC leadership team, you will play an integral role in growing our DC office. You will be responsible for driving sales and delivery of technology, transformation, and business solutions, primarily in the commercial sector, while mentoring and growing a strong team of leaders. You can expect to:

 - Generate new Commerical client accounts and grow them over time, particularly among mid-market and larger companies across multiple industry segments in the DC area (Pariveda is not focused on Federal Clients at this time).

 - Nurture and expand existing strategic accounts to achieve established revenue targets.

 - Establish credibility and trust with C-level clients, delivering technology and business transformation solutions that meet their needs.

 - Lead client engagements from estimation through delivery, including project management, quality assurance, and ensuring successful outcomes.

 - Lead business development activities by driving sales efforts and managing the sales process, including cultivating client relationships, client proposal efforts and project scoping.

 - Diagnose complex technical and business problems and work to uncover unknown and unmet client needs.

Our vision is to be a different kind of firm that can be the model for all organizations which seek to position themselves to react more quickly and ready to change. To realize this imperative for ourselves and our clients requires people with a unique blend of skills, competencies, character, and motivations.

Are you ready to work in an environment where you are seen and understood as a whole person? Do you want to stop wondering whether you’re paid and treated equitably? Are you a critical thinker and problem “diagnoser”? Do you have the ability to connect the dots that others don’t see, pulling on threads to get to the true root of the problem?  - Facilitate workshops, working sessions, executive discussions, and presentations that drive alignment, decision-making, and organizational change.

 - Manage delivery risks, dependencies, and tradeoffs while maintaining strong client trust and ensuring quality outcomes.

 - Leverage AI strategically to enhance client solutions, streamline delivery, uncover insights, and promote responsible and ethical AI practices.

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, personal and professional development, and lead community service and social gathering events

 - Work within a hybrid model, balancing time between client sites, the office, and home.

 - Collaborate with smart, humble, and supportive colleagues.

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people

 - Background in technical and/or management consulting

 - Demonstrated project management experience - planning, estimation, execution, issue/risk management and resource management/allocation

 - Experience diagnosing and solving complex problems and delivering them to technical and non-technical audiences

 - A strong understanding of technology-

source_jobs.title: Accounting Manager
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is seeking an Accounting Manager to join our Finance and Accounting team in Dallas. This is a collaborative, analytical, and problem-solving role, one that requires strong judgment, clear communication, and a genuine passion for improving processes, building teams, and developing people.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/culture/#findamentals– the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:
As a member of the Finance and Accounting team, you will own the enterprise-wide accounting function and lead a high-performing team to ensure accurate, timely financial reporting across multiple entities in compliance with US GAAP. You can expect to:

 - Own the month-end close process across multiple entities, ensuring accurate and timely journal entries, reconciliations, and consolidated financial statements.

 - Lead the Accounting team and partner with external accounting firm to complete the annual financial statement audit.

 - Prepare and present monthly financial results to internal and external stakeholders.

 - Maintain effective internal financial controls to support accurate reporting, compliance, and risk mitigation.

 - Oversee revenue recognition and project accounting in compliance with US GAAP.

 - Review key balance sheet reconciliations, including WIP, unbilled and deferred revenue, prepaids, benefit and tax accruals, and other accounts.

 - Support international accounting needs, including statutory reporting, intercompany billing, and entity compliance.

 - Drive process and systems improvements, including experimenting with and applying AI and automation to enhance data quality, efficiency, and controls.

 - Research new accounting pronouncements, analyze and communicate their impact on financial reporting and business decisions.

 - Lead and develop a team of accounting professionals through coaching, delegation, and timely feedback.

 - Partner with leaders across the firm to provide timely, accurate financial information and translate complex accounting matters into clear business impacts for decision-making.

 - Work within a hybrid model, collaborating with smart, humble, and supportive colleagues



We Look For:
The successful candidate possesses the following critical qualifications:

 - 6-8 years of progressive accounting experience, including at least 2 years in a people management role (coaching, performance management).

 - CPA required, with a strong foundation in US GAAP and financial statement preparation.

 - Experience managing month-end close, financial reporting, and audits for a mid-sized company or comparable scale.

 - Proven attention to detail combined with strong project management skills and the ability to juggle competing priorities under tight deadlines.

 - Demonstrated experience coaching, developing, and supporting the growth of team members.

 - Background in professional services or project-based businesses (consulting, public accounting, law, architecture, or engineering) with working knowledge of billable hours and revenue recognition, preferred.

 - Multi-entity and international accounting experience

 - Experience in public accounting (audit) and/or corporate accounting

 - Experience with NetSuite highly preferred

 - Strong communicator who can translate complex accounting topics into clear, business-

source_jobs.title: Senior Management Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Are you a critical thinker with exceptional problem-solving skills? Do you want to help clients define and achieve their vision for transformation? Pariveda is seeking a Senior Management Consultant to join our Advisory consulting group in Dallas, Houston, or Chicago. Our Advisory team delivers strategically connected management consulting services at moments of critical change to solve root challenges, discover breakthrough opportunities, and guide the decisions that define our clients' enterprise-wide initiatives.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://www.parivedasolutions.com/findamentals – the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

As a Senior Consultant, you will work closely with partner-led teams to deliver high-quality, thoughtful project deliverables across organizational design, change enablement, AI transformation, process optimization, and technology assessment efforts. You can expect to:

 - Grow your career with the support and guidance of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined, individualized career path, with promotion opportunities every 12 months.

 - Support client transformation initiatives through research, analysis, and structured problem-solving

 - Conduct analysis and synthesize findings to develop actionable recommendations and support informed decision-making

 - Create executive presentations and visual deliverables that help leaders understand current challenges, proposed changes, and future ways of working

 - Conduct qualitative and quantitative analysis, including stakeholder interviews, survey and data analysis, and process or workflow mapping

 - Participate in workshops and working sessions, helping capture insights and shape recommendations

 - Collaborate within small, high-performing teams (typically 3–5 people) with frequent exposure to Principals and Vice Presidents

 - Contribute to development of Advisory frameworks, methods, and intellectual capital

 - Partner with Pariveda and client leadership to drive initiatives forward and deliver meaningful outcomes

 - Engage in our culture of continuous learning, mentorship, professional development, and community involvement

 - Work collaboratively within a hybrid model, alongside smart, humble, and supportive people
   
   

We Look For:

 - 3+ years of consulting, client-facing, or highly relevant industry experience, ideally supporting transformation, organizational change, or technology-enabled initiatives

 - Experience contributing to or leading projects involving organizational design, organizational change management, operating models, process improvement, or large-scale transformation

 - Familiarity with consulting frameworks such as Prosci, McKinsey's 7-S, Target Operating Model, EOS, Lean Six Sigma, Value Stream Mapping, or Business Model Canvas

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex challenges and synthesize insights for stakeholders across different functions and levels

 - Comfort working at the intersection of business and technology, with a general understanding of how systems, data, and cloud platforms support business processes (you do not need to be a deep technologist)

 - Curiosity and a growth mindset, with an interest in emerging technologies and AI-enabled ways of working

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skil

Pariveda is seeking a Manager to join our Advisory consulting group in Dallas, Houston, or Chicago. Our Advisory team delivers strategically connected management consulting services at moments of critical change to solve root challenges, discover breakthrough opportunities, and guide the decisions that define our clients' enterprise-wide initiatives.

As an Advisory Manager, you will partner closely with clients to navigate organizational change, optimize processes, reimagine operating models, assess technology capabilities, and enable successful transformations. Joining our growing firm provides a unique opportunity to develop leading consulting skills, deepen your expertise, and apply proven frameworks across a diverse range of industries and business challenges.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/culture/#findamentals– the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

As an Advisory Manager, you will serve as a primary day-to-day leader on Advisory engagements, working directly with client stakeholders to drive outcomes across change, org, and operations. You can expect to:

 - Drive your career and become an executive through clearly defined expectations, mentorship from Principals and Vice Presidents, and frequent opportunities for advancement

 - Manage and nurture small teams and help teammates to diagnose and solve complex organizational and operational problems for clients across industries

 - Own workstreams on strategy, operating model, org design, or change management, from framing through delivery of recommendations and implementation support

 - Execute projects from start to finish and get exposure to all roles throughout the project life cycle - planning, estimation, execution, issue/risk management, and resource management/allocation

 - Design and facilitate client workshops, stakeholder interviews, and working sessions to co-create future state processes, capabilities, and ways of working

 - Develop and socialize change strategies, stakeholder impact assessments, communications plans, and training approaches

 - Translate complex qualitative and quantitative analysis into clear executive-ready deliverables and narratives

 - Coach and develop Associates and Senior Consultants through day-to-day feedback, delegation, and career conversations

 - Partner closely with Principals and Vice Presidents on engagement framing, quality, and client relationship management

 - Contribute to the growth of Advisory by shaping methods, frameworks, and thought leadership in organizational change and operations

 - Work collaboratively within a hybrid model, alongside smart, humble, and supportive people



We Look For:

The successful candidate possesses the following critical qualifications:

 - 5+ years of professional consulting, client-facing, or highly relevant industry experience, with meaningful time spent in management consulting, organizational change, operating model, or transformation work

 - Demonstrated experience leading or managing teams and workstreams on change, org, or process-focused projects

 - Familiarity with consulting frameworks such as Prosci, McKinsey's 7-S, Target Operating Model,

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

Pariveda is not your average professional services firm. Looking to join a team in New York City where you will be challenged and encouraged to grow your career in a supportive, purpose-driven environment?

Explore a career with Pariveda, an employee-owned professional services firm that provides strategy and technology services—from idea to impact. We have been named by Glassdoor as a Best Place to Work seven times since 2017 and are currently looking for motivated individuals who are passionate about using technology to solve problems and help others succeed.

To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://www.parivedasolutions.com/findamentals – the behaviors that show who we are.




YOU CAN EXPECT TO:

As a Pariveda Consultant, you will work in small teams, collaborating with other Pariveda employees while partnering with clients to solve real business challenges in an agile, people-first way.

 - Grow your career with the support of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined career path. You will be reviewed every 6 months and eligible for promotion every 12 months.

 - Try new things to develop yourself as a leader. Learn to estimate, gather requirements, develop, test, manage projects, architect and deliver. We do it all!

 - Explore different technologies and develop applications in languages including: Java, .NET, Python, JavaScript, and SQL, Web technologies like React, Redux, Angular, Vue, Mobile technologies including iOS and Android, Cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and Data Driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, DevOps, and more.

 - Utilize AI strategically to enhance client solutions, incorporating AI tools to streamline development, uncover insights, and accelerate delivery while clearly communicating the value, limitations, and ethical use of AI to clients and stakeholders.

 - Sharpen your professional communication skills. Create and present findings, solutions, and demos to audiences including senior executives and stakeholders.

 - Work within a hybrid model

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, community service, social gatherings, and personal and professional development.

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people.




WE LOOK FOR:

 - Passionate technologists with software development or relevant internship experience

 - Lifelong learners for a passion for technology

 - Skilled problem solvers with the desire and proven ability to create innovative solutions

 - Flexible and adaptable attitude- Client, teams and technologies will change with each new challenge

 - Future technology leaders- Dynamic individuals energized by fast paced personal and professional growth

 - Professional communicators who can explain and present concepts to technical and non-technical audiences alike

 - Bachelor’s Degree in MIS, Computer Science, Math, Engineering or comparable experience

 - Legally authorized to work for any company in the United States without sponsorship




PARIVEDA BENEFITS

 - Transparent and Equitable Salary. The entry-level salary is $79,800 with cost of labor increases for our Los Angeles, New York, San Francisco, Seattle, and Washington DC markets.

 - Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance for you and your family

 - Employer Health Savings Account (HSA) contribution

 - 2% 401(k), vested immediately

 - Company own

 - A well-established network of clients and professional relationships in the Philadelphia regional market, across a variety of industries and business functions.

 - Proven ability to quickly establish rapport, credibility, trust, and respect with C-level clients.

 - Involvement in local professional networking and civic/community activities.

 - Demonstrated ability to plan and man

Pariveda http://www.parivedasolutions.com is a North American-based, employee-owned professional services firm. We provide strategy and technology services across industries. As a mission-driven organization and Certified B Corp, we enable our clients to imagine and do more, whether it’s making next quarter’s goals or navigating the future. From ideas to impact, we help clients get better at what they do to improve people and profits. Learn more https://parivedasolutions.com/careers/ about our mission and culture as well as our recruitment process and interview prep.

If you are looking for a place where you’ll be challenged to learn, grow, and truly make an impact, we invite you to explore opportunities with our team in Toronto. We are looking for lead software developers to design, develop, and deliver enterprise-level applications. You will have an opportunity to expand your knowledge of full software development life cycle, gain direct client exposure, and grow junior team members.



Pariveda is not your average professional services firm. Our focus on people is the key to our success and our mission is to grow you towards your highest potential. We don’t measure one’s worth by the hours they log but rather by their individual growth. We live and celebrate our values by supporting and caring for the whole person, operating transparently, and being curious and unafraid to ask questions. To learn more about our culture and what you can expect at Pariveda, review our Findamentals https://www.parivedasolutions.com/findamentals – the behaviors that show who we are.



You Can Expect To:

As a lead software engineer, you will build custom solutions using a variety of technologies. You will work in small, collaborative teams, while partnering with clients to solve real business challenges in an agile, people-first way.

 - Grow your career with the support and guidance of a dedicated mentor and a clearly defined, individualized career path. You will be eligible for promotion every 12 months

 - Lead small Pariveda teams and help teammates develop their skills and careers

 - Diagnose and solve complex problems for Fortune-500 clients in a variety of industries

 - Execute projects from start to finish and get exposure to all roles throughout the SDLC (manage projects, estimate, gather requirements, architect, develop, test, and deliver)

 - Explore different technologies and develop in cloud technologies like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Build modern applications, data driven solutions, IoT, Machine Learning, AI, DevOps, and more with languages including: Python, .NET, Java, JavaScript, and SQL, Web technologies like React, Redux, Angular, Vue, and Mobile technologies including iOS and Android.

 - Utilize AI strategically to enhance client solutions, incorporating AI tools to streamline development, uncover insights, and accelerate delivery while clearly communicating the value, limitations, and ethical use of AI to clients and stakeholders.

 - Present findings, solutions, and demos to audiences including senior executives and stakeholders

 - Work within a hybrid model

 - Actively engage in our culture of continuous learning, personal and professional development, and lead community service and social gathering events

 - Work with smart, humble, and supportive people



We Look For:

 - 3+ years of hands-on software development experience

 - Experience with technical leadership such as coaching others and/or leading pieces of projects (estimating/assigning tasks, putting together timelines, requirements gathering, design, etc.)

 - Client facing or consulting experience highly preferred

 - Skilled problem solvers with the desire and proven ability to create and implement innovative solutions

 - Adaptable attitude, able to balance multiple responsibilities, and adjust to varied environments

 - Ability to explain and present concepts to technical and non-technical audiences

 - Bachelor’s Degree in MIS, Computer Science,

notes: Pariveda is a professional services firm with a strong focus on technology and strategy consulting.
